free_text: The 11B(p,n)11C cross section from threshold to 4.9 MeV
tantalum backings by electron bombardment of isotopic
boron powder /97.15% 11B/ placed into a tantalum
crucible. the targets were between 80 and 120 ug/cm2
length and 2.52 cm in diameter. Larger stilbene
crystal with two sizes of NE213 liquid scintillators
Tabulated value from the text on p.48.
FLAG and value at E=3.58 added.
Statistical errors are as indicated or do
not exceed the size of the dots.
